report_name: EDPB Adopts Common Template for GDPR Data Breach Notifications

identities.name: European Data Protection Board
identities.description: The regulatory body that adopted a common, standardized template for organizations to use when notifying supervisory authorities of a personal data breach under the GDPR.

identities.name: Multinational Corporations
identities.description: A class of organizations operating in multiple EU countries that will benefit from the standardized GDPR notification template by no longer needing to navigate different reporting forms.

identities.name: Small and Medium-Sized Enterprises
identities.description: A class of organizations that will benefit from the clearer, more straightforward GDPR breach notification process, reducing the risk of non-compliant notifications.
